skills.title: Front-End
skills.description: Expert in crafting intuitive and efficient web solutions using React.js, Redux.js, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, with a deep understanding of state management, component architecture, and responsive design principles.

skills.title: Back-End

skills.title: Data Structure

skills.title: DBMS
skills.description: Competent in utilizing relational databases with SQL, focusing on data organization, basic query optimization, and maintaining data integrity while developing practical database solutions.

portfolio.title: DocMedx
